title: The Straw Hats Turn the Raid Around
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Kaido, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What's that got to do with anything?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You spent your entire life running around this island,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Grawling through the Attics and desperately trying to escape...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah, that's right. There were those Samuel...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone that shows you compassion ends up dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Take some food and this blanket...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apparently, he was secretly feeding the ONI princess.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that troublesmaking runaway still pretending to be open?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their acts of kindness were just lies!! The truth is, they were all afraid of you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, you could easily use your power to impose your will on others!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the offspring of an ON!! Relying on the friendship of humans is beneath you!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: That is your lot in life, Yamato!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're so fast!! We're gonna catch up in no time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see some shadowy figures on the roof!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yeah, are your eyes closed or something?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course, you oaf! As if I could fly with my eyes open!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We want to get to the roof!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What the hell!? Another drag on?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Knock it off, Momo!! What do you think you're doing?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 47 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
